title: High-level phases decomposed into bounded task families
objective: Iterate the canonical task graph until every high-level LifeOS phase is decomposed into complete, dependency-ordered, proof-bearing task families whose summed outcomes equal the North Star, while product execution remains fail-closed pending owner approval.

work_items.surface: generated/north_star_coverage.source.csv (5 immutable anchors: NS-EXTENSION, NS-WHOLE, NS-CLARITY, NS-DIRECTION, NS-PROGRESS)
work_items.decision: Certify that every coverage row carries a bounded phase_task_ids child-task family and a decomposition_status, and that every referenced task id resolves in task_graph.source.csv. Verified: 5/5 rows complete, 0 unmapped. Decomposition status stays 'owner-decision-pending' by design.
Certify that every observed gap maps to a non-empty phase_task_ids set and a required_task_family, all resolving to real tasks. Verified: 45/45 rows mapped, 0 missing, 0 unmapped.

work_items.owner: LifeOS Planning Spine / Governance Board (via GRAPH-002)
work_items.decision: Certify that every conflicting prior task carries an explicit disposition and canonical_task_ids that resolve, and that no execution_gate authorizes out-of-graph execution. Verified: 42/42 dispositioned (17 distinct dispositions), 0 empty, 0 unmapped. Inherits the GRAPH-002 reconciliation proof.

Certify that every processed NotebookLM claim maps to a task (task_ids non-empty). Verified: 396/396 claims carry task_ids; all 32 registry sources captured with mapped_claim_count == claim_count (396 = 396).

Certify one verification-queue entry per claim and that each unresolved (queued) claim carries a next_action. Verified: 396 queue rows, 1:1 with claims, 0 orphan entries, 323 queued (each with next_action) + 73 resolved (17 verified, 19 refuted, 37 qualified).

Certify evidence stays claim-scoped and provenance-preserving (source_uri + exact_pointer + content_sha256/version), with cross-references resolving to real graph entities. Verified: 135/135 scoped and provenanced, 0 dangling; 7 relation rows additionally cross-reference real tasks/conflicts.

work_items.surface: generated/task_graph.source.csv structural integrity (196 tasks across 27 phases)
work_items.decision: Certify no declared phase is empty (27/27 populated, 0 undeclared) and no task lacks a North Star path (LIFEOS-000 sole root; all 196 tasks reachable over the acyclic parent_ids DAG; 0 orphan parents). Distinct from the stricter execution-opening 'tasks_anchored' coverage check, which remains owner-gated.

work_items.surface: Execution posture across coverage/gap/conflict execution gates + owner_execution_approval
work_items.decision: Keep product execution fail-closed: owner_execution_approval='closed', all coverage and gap execution gates closed-prefixed, no conflict gate authorizes open/out-of-graph execution. Preserve STORE-001's tiered store-authority model with no state-class reclassification absent a verified BlobStore SHA-256 parity cutover.

completion_gate: Every coverage row has bounded child-task families, every observed gap maps to those tasks, conflicting prior tasks have explicit dispositions, every processed NotebookLM claim maps to a task and verification queue where unresolved, evidence remains claim-scoped and provenance-preserving, no phase is empty, no task lacks a North Star path, and product execution remains closed. GRAPH-001.proof.json records the in-place certification with concrete per-clause counts and zero product execution.
